subject: fix(ui): improve range slider visibility in light and dark themes
body:
Track was using base-300 which barely contrasted with panel backgrounds.
Now uses base-content at 20% opacity with a subtle border, ensuring
visibility across all 16 DaisyUI themes. Thumb border changed from
base-100 to primary-content for better contrast.

Tags: ui, accessibility, theming
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: restructure-panel-layout
Semver: patch
